preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Biorepository Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Manage biological specimen lifecycle from intake through disposal with ISO 20387:2018 compliance

column.name: protocol
column.value: AHRI Biorepository Standard Operating Procedures

column.name: content
column.value: Biorepository Laboratory notebook template with 7 predefined workflow pages for sample intake and registration, storage assignment, environmental monitoring, sample request and retrieval, QC inspection, retention and disposal, and reporting and audit.

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Intake and Registration page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Intake & Registration

column.name: instructions
column.value: Stage 1: Receive shipments, register samples (single or bulk manifest), verify documentation, and generate barcodes. Sub-stages: (1a) Shipment Reception - record delivery reference, sender, packaging condition, transport temperature, capture photo if damaged; (1b) Sample Registration - enter samples individually or import via CSV manifest with validation; (1c) Documentation Verification - 7-point checklist (sample identifiers, project linkage, ethics approval, informed consent, MTA, biosafety classification, packaging integrity); (1d) Barcode Generation - DataMatrix 2D barcodes with printable labels.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Storage Assignment page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Storage Assignment

column.name: instructions
column.value: Assign samples to hierarchical storage locations. Select storage hierarchy: Room > Device (Freezer/Refrigerator/Cabinet) > Rack > Box > Position. System validates biosafety zone compatibility. Scan barcode for verification. Record storage timestamp and assigned by. Confirm placement with barcode scan.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Ongoing Storage and Monitoring page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Ongoing Storage and Monitoring

column.name: instructions
column.value: Record temperature readings for storage devices. System flags excursions based on device-specific thresholds. Acknowledge excursions with corrective action notes. View dashboard of devices overdue for readings. Log maintenance events (calibration, repairs, defrost cycles).

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Request and Retrieval page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Request & Retrieval

column.name: instructions
column.value: Process sample requests from researchers. Request workflow: Submit request with purpose and quantity needed. Supervisor approval/rejection with comments. Generate work orders for approved requests. Document retrieval with timestamp and staff signature. Update sample status: Checked Out or Partially Aliquoted.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create QC Inspection page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: QC Inspection

column.name: instructions
column.value: Execute scheduled quality control inspections. Verify sample presence at recorded location. Check physical condition (container integrity, volume, appearance). Record discrepancies and corrective actions. Update sample status if quarantine required.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Retention and Disposal page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Retention & Disposal

column.name: instructions
column.value: Manage sample retention policies and disposal workflow. Review samples approaching retention expiry. Obtain dual authorization for disposal (requestor + supervisor). Select disposal method (autoclaving, incineration, chemical treatment). Generate disposal certificates. Update sample status: Disposed. Archive disposal records.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Reporting and Audit page for Biorepository Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Reporting & Audit

column.name: instructions
column.value: Generate reports and review audit trail. Available reports: Inventory summary, Temperature excursion log, Sample transaction history, Disposal certificates, Storage utilization, Project sample counts. Review complete audit trail for any sample. Export reports in CSV, PDF, or FHIR format. Generate ISO 20387 compliance documentation.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Biorepository Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Sync workflow_page_template_seq to be beyond max existing ID

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE workflow_category = 'BIOREPOSITORY'

changeSet.comment: Insert predefined Biorepository workflow page templates

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Intake & Registration

column.name: description
column.value: Receive shipments, register samples (single or bulk), verify documentation, generate barcodes

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Stage 1 workflow with 4 sub-stages: Shipment Reception, Sample Registration, Documentation Verification, and Barcode Generation.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Intake and Registration - Bulk data entry for incoming biorepository samples

column.name: name
column.value: Storage Assignment

column.name: description
column.value: Assign samples to hierarchical storage locations with biosafety validation

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Select storage hierarchy, validate biosafety zone compatibility, scan barcode for confirmation.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Storage Assignment - Hierarchical location assignment with validation

column.name: name
column.value: Ongoing Storage and Monitoring

column.name: description
column.value: Record temperature readings, manage excursions, log maintenance events

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Enter temperature readings, acknowledge excursions, track maintenance schedules.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Ongoing Storage and Monitoring - Temperature tracking and excursion management

column.name: name
column.value: Sample Request & Retrieval

column.name: description
column.value: Process sample requests, manage approvals, document retrieval

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Submit requests, obtain approvals, generate work orders, document retrieval with chain of custody.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Sample Request and Retrieval - Request workflow and retrieval documentation

column.name: name
column.value: QC Inspection

column.name: description
column.value: Execute scheduled QC inspections, verify sample presence and condition

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Verify location, check physical condition, record discrepancies, update status if quarantine required.

column.name: default_content
column.value: QC Inspection - Scheduled quality control verification

column.name: name
column.value: Retention & Disposal

column.name: description
column.value: Manage retention policies, obtain dual authorization, document disposal

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Review expiring samples, obtain dual authorization, execute disposal, generate certificates.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Retention and Disposal - Sample lifecycle closure

column.name: name
column.value: Reporting & Audit

column.name: description
column.value: Generate reports, review audit trail, export compliance documentation

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: Generate inventory, excursion, and transaction reports. Review audit trail and export in CSV, PDF, or FHIR format.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Reporting and Audit - Reports and compliance documentation
